title: [NoRWX] Proof-of-Concept
purpose: Demonstrates execution of position-independent x86-64 machine code from read/write-only memory without requiring executable permissions.
description: NoRWX is a security research project that explores unconventional code execution techniques. It leverages hardware breakpoints combined with Vectored Exception Handling (VEH) to execute arbitrary machine code from memory regions that lack execute permissions. This proof-of-concept demonstrates that traditional memory protection mechanisms can be bypassed through creative use of CPU debugging features.
features: Windows API calls from emulated code

title: [cpp-pic] Position-Independent Runtime
purpose: A C++23 framework enabling position-independent code generation across multiple platforms and architectures.
description: cpp-pic is a comprehensive C++23 framework designed for creating truly position-independent code that can run on multiple platforms without modification. It provides a complete runtime environment including cryptographic primitives, network protocols, and an embedded scripting language. The framework resolves all dependencies at runtime using platform-specific techniques like Windows PEB walking and Linux syscalls.
features: Multi-platform (Windows, Linux, UEFI) and multi-architecture (i386, x86_64, armv7a, aarch64)
TLS 1.3 with certificate verification, DNS, HTTP, WebSocket
technologies: C++23, Windows PEB/NTAPI, Linux syscalls, UEFI
audience: Security researchers, systems programmers, embedded developers

title: [EC] Armenian Encoding Converter
purpose: A utility for converting Armenian text between multiple encoding formats including ANSI, Unicode, and ArmSCII.
description: EC (Encoding Converter) is a specialized tool for handling the complex landscape of Armenian text encodings. It supports conversion between legacy encodings like ArmSCII-8 and modern Unicode, making it essential for working with historical Armenian documents. The tool includes batch processing capabilities and integrates with Microsoft Office documents for seamless workflow integration.
useCases: Converting legacy Armenian documents to Unicode
Batch processing of multilingual text files
Migrating old databases with Armenian content
